item.title: Version 1.0
item.description:
ParkShelf 1.0

The first public release of ParkShelf for Mac.

  • Park any window onto a floating shelf — drag it there or press ⌥P — and pull it back the moment you need it (⌥⇧R restores everything).
  • Live previews: click a parked card to peek at the window, or tear it straight back into your workspace.
  • Stays out of your way: the shelf dozes into a tiny puck when idle, and wakes on hover.
  • Make it yours: Current, Liquid Glass, and Liquid Glass Clear appearances, with Translucency and Tint sliders.
